findings.title: No pre-commit hooks, CODEOWNERS, or GitHub Actions exist despite being referenced as enforced controls
findings.detail: Multiple files asserted that pre-commit hooks enforce secret-pattern rejection and that CODEOWNERS + a dedicated GitHub Action enforce the Protected Paths auto-merge gate. However, no enforcement files existed. The entire security enforcement layer described across SECURITY.md, AGENTS.md, ENV.md, and NON_GOALS.md was aspirational documentation, not reality.

findings.title: Sprint SPRINT-2026-05-A ends today (2026-05-20) but repo has had zero updates since initial scaffold on 2026-05-15
findings.detail: The sprint defined in SPRINT.md ended but git log showed exactly one commit since the scaffold. For a coordination repo whose purpose is to be the source of truth for sprint state, being 5 days stale on sprint-end day is a fundamental failure.
findings.fix_sketch: Reconciled stale SPRINT/ROADMAP/STATUS/CHANGELOG to match git reality; sprint marked incomplete, no fabricated progress.

findings.title: ENV.md missing Stripe and Documenso secret_refs that INTEGRATIONS.md declares
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md declared secret_refs for STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, and DOCUMENSO_API_KEY. ENV.md contained zero rows for any of these. The rotation calendar and reserved prefixes list were also incomplete.
findings.fix_sketch: Added all four missing var rows with scope, rotation cadence, and consumed_by. Added STRIPE_* reserved prefix. Added to rotation calendar.

findings.title: ADR-0006 contains a lazy reference 'NG-something equivalent' instead of citing the actual Non-Goal ID
findings.detail: docs/decisions/0006-retell-default-voice.md line 42 contains an unresolved placeholder 'NG-something equivalent'. This is an accepted ADR. The actual reference should be SPRINT.md No-gos item 5. The vague reference undermines traceability for workers.
findings.fix_sketch: REQUIRES HUMAN: .claude/settings.json hook blocks autonomous edits to status: accepted ADRs. Sebastian must manually add an erratum note at the bottom of ADR-0006 clarifying 'NG-something equivalent = SPRINT.md §No-gos item 5 (NOT migrating from Retell mid-sprint)'.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' section only covers 6 of 10 No-Gos from NON_GOALS.md
findings.detail: NON_GOALS.md defines 10 No-Gos. ROADMAP.md 'Not Doing' listed only 6 and contained a duplicate entry. Agents reading ROADMAP.md missed 4 No-Gos.
findings.fix_sketch: Replaced stale partial list with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md as the canonical source. Eliminates sync drift permanently.

findings.title: README.md references stale IFleet status memory file (2026-05-13), missing the 2026-05-19 launch
findings.detail: README.md pointed to project_status_20260513.md, predating IFleet's launch at commit df0a302 on 2026-05-19. New contributors would think IFleet was in Phase A green state.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated IFleet table row to reflect launched state. Updated memory path reference to MEMORY.md index instead of a hardcoded stale filename.

findings.title: SECURITY.md security.txt references unresolved TBD URLs that will break RFC 9116 compliance
findings.detail: SECURITY.md security.txt block had two TBD-suffixed lines that would produce invalid security.txt if mirrored verbatim. INTEGRATIONS.md had two unverified status page URLs with 'verify URL' flags since 2026-05-15.
findings.fix_sketch: Removed Encryption and Policy lines; added note to add them before publication. Removed 'verify URL' placeholders from Retell and Hostinger status pages.

findings.title: costs.json references IFleet PR #39 as the cost tracker but no cross-repo write mechanism exists
findings.detail: .omc/costs.json _notes claimed IFleet's cost tracker (PR #39) would recompute totals, but IFleet cannot write to Factory's costs.json across repo boundaries. The file was misleading about who writes to it.
findings.fix_sketch: Updated _notes to clarify factory-repo-only scope, qualified the PR #39 reference to note it lives in IFleet's repo.

findings.title: CHANGELOG.md ADR-0010 missing from the Decisions subsection
findings.detail: CHANGELOG.md Decisions subsection listed ADR-0001 through ADR-0009 but omitted ADR-0010 ('Issues created by 4 upstream sources + humans'). DECISIONS.md listed all 10.
findings.fix_sketch: Split the combined ADR-0003/ADR-0010 reference into two explicit separate entries.

findings.title: SPRINT-2026-05-B promised in 4 files but does not exist 2 days after being needed
findings.detail: SPRINT.md, ROADMAP.md, .omc/STATUS.md, and CHANGELOG.md all referenced SPRINT-2026-05-B as the immediate next action. No such sprint content existed as of 2026-05-22.
findings.fix_sketch: Added SPRINT-2026-05-B pending stub to SPRINT.md so the reference resolves without fabricating content. Stub explicitly requires Sebastian+Esme to fill the real plan.

findings.title: ROADMAP 'Not Doing' duplicates the same No-Go in two differently-worded bullets
findings.detail: ROADMAP.md had two bullets expressing the same NoGo-1 constraint with different framing (compete with dev tools / ship dev tools for sale).
findings.fix_sketch: Resolved as side-effect of AUDIT-factory-4e615356 fix: the entire stale 'Not Doing' section was replaced with a pointer to NON_GOALS.md.
